props.name: ariaDescribedby
props.description: Sets the `aria-describedby` property on the tree view.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description:
Provides an `aria-label` to the tree view that screen readers can read (for accessibility).
Don't use `ariaLabel` and `ariaLabelledby` at the same time.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description:
Sets the `aria-labelledby` property on the tree view.
If there's a visible label element that you can reference, use this instead of `ariaLabel`.
Don't use `ariaLabel` and `ariaLabelledby` at the same time.

props.name: connectorLines
props.description: Shows connector lines highlighting hierarchy between parent and child items.

props.name: expandedItems
props.description: Provides the IDs of the expanded tree view items. It controls whether an item is expanded or collapsed.

props.name: getItemChildren
props.description: Specifies the nested items that are displayed when a tree view item gets expanded.

props.name: getItemId
props.description: Provides a unique identifier for each tree view item.

props.name: i18nStrings
props.description: An object containing all the necessary localized strings required by the component.

props.name: items
props.description: Specifies the top-level items to display in the tree view. Use `getItemChildren` to provide nested items.

props.name: renderItem
props.description:
Use this property to map your data to tree view items. This property must return an object with the following properties:
* `content` (unknown) - The content of the item.
* `icon` (unknown) - (Optional) The icon of the item.
* `secondaryContent` (unknown) - (Optional) Secondary content of the item, such as a description of the item.
* `actions` (unknown) - (Optional) Actions related to the item. Use [button](/components/button/?tabId=playground&example=inline-icon-button) with inline-icon or inline-link variants. For items with multiple actions, use [button dropdown](/components/button-dropdown/?tabId=playground&example=inline-icon-button-dropdown) with the inline-icon variant.
* `announcementLabel` (string) - (Optional) An announcement label for the item, used for labeling the toggle button. By default, the `content` is used. Make sure to provide the `announcementLabel` if `content` is not a string.

props.name: renderItemToggleIcon
props.description: Use this property to display a custom icon in the toggle button.
